\cvrow{CONTACT}{%
  \parbox[t]{0.48\rcolwidth}{%
    \raggedright
    \textbf{Email:} \href{mailto:ariveras@northgate.edu}{ariveras@northgate.edu}\\
    \textbf{Phone:} (555) 342-7819%
  }%
  \hfill
  \parbox[t]{0.48\rcolwidth}{%
    \raggedleft
    \textbf{Github:} \href{https://github.com/alexrs-nut}{https://github.com/alexrs-nut}\\
    \textbf{Website:} \href{https://northgate.edu/\textasciitilde ariveras}{northgate.edu/\textasciitilde ariveras}%
  }%
  \\[2pt]
  \textbf{LinkedIn:} \href{https://www.linkedin.com/in/alex-rivera-santos/}{https://www.linkedin.com/in/alex-rivera-santos/}%
}
